title: Top Up
stripeNote: Payments processed securely by Stripe. Card details are never stored on our servers.
paySuccess: Payment successful - your balance has been updated.
payCancel: Payment cancelled - no charge was made.
noPayments: No top-ups yet. Payments will appear here after your first purchase.

autoTopUp.title: Auto Top-up
autoTopUp.warning: Auto top-up may take a few minutes; raise your threshold to prevent running out.
autoTopUp.hint: ${{credits}} will be added when balance falls below ${{threshold}}
